scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start -w server
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
